nodes.name: EN
nodes.summary: EN表示 IUCN 濒危等级，当前关联384种鸟类，如朱鹮、中华秋沙鸭、黑脸琵鹭等384种鸟类。

nodes.name: 森林砍伐
nodes.summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。

nodes.name: 外来捕食者
nodes.summary: 岛屿鸟类常受猫、鼬和鼠等外来种影响。

nodes.name: 成熟森林
nodes.summary: 具备成熟林冠和树洞资源的森林生境。

nodes.name: 开阔山地
nodes.summary: 地形开阔且便于大翼展鸟类活动的山地区域。

nodes.name: Long-legged thicketbird
nodes.summary: Long-legged thicketbird（Long-legged thicketbird，学名 Cincloramphus rufus），在图谱中标记为濒危（EN）物种，常见栖息地包括开阔山地、成熟森林，主要威胁包括森林砍伐、外来捕食者。

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: The species inhabits old-growth forest in mountainous areas on Viti Levu, usually in habitat adjacent to streams

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: The species inhabits old-growth forest in mountainous areas on Viti Levu, usually in habitat adjacent to streams

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: Threats include some logging and the impact of introduced predators (the small Asian mongoose and the black rat)

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: Threats include some logging and the impact of introduced predators (the small Asian mongoose and the black rat)
